scope: Only records split rules explicitly stated in the paper.

sen12ms_primary_benchmark.split_goal: avoid spatial leakage while preserving original georeferencing
sen12ms_primary_benchmark.id_status: Paper text does not provide explicit scene-id lists or ratio; fill from released protocol assets if available.

bigearthnet_mm_zero_shot_transfer.sr_training_rule: SR models are trained on SEN12MS and directly applied without retraining on BigEarthNet-MM.
